name: Calciforge Channel
description: Registers Calciforge's inbound HTTP bridge so messages flow through OpenClaw's full agent runtime and replies are delivered back to Calciforge.

replyWebhook.description: URL to POST agent responses back to Calciforge, e.g. http://calciforge.lan:18797/hooks/reply

replyAuthToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating callbacks to Calciforge's reply webhook

runTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for the OpenClaw run before treating it as timed out

errorRecoveryMs.description: Additional time to wait for fallback-generated replies after OpenClaw reports an early run error
